query: My sway exec line runs `eww reload && eww open dashboard` after editing the config, but sometimes the dashboard never opens even though reload looked fine. I removed an old window from the config recently. What's happening and how should I chain these?
expected_behavior: Explains that eww reload exits with code 1 when a previously-open window no longer exists in the config, so with && the second command never runs
Recommends using `;` instead of `&&`: `eww reload ; eww open dashboard` so the open runs regardless of reload's exit code
May note that reload should be tried before eww kill, and full restart (kill && daemon && open) is the fallback only when the config fails to parse
notes: Guards against the && vs ; chaining trap with eww reload — a removed window makes reload return non-zero, silently skipping the open. A naive answer would blame the config parse; the skill knows the exit-code behavior. CLI.md 'eww reload' Important behavior.
